prompt: A tabletop scene with 8 tennis balls in different colors on a table, with bounding boxes around each ball. The balls should be labeled with their colors.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of eight tennis balls, each in a different distinct color, loosely scattered across a flat tabletop. Each tennis ball must be clearly outlined by a bounding box. Adjacent to each bounding box, there should be a text label accurately stating the color of the ball it encloses.
objects: bounding box for each tennis ball
text label for each tennis ball stating its color
